Title: The Great Silence
Concept: Uncover history's deepest secrets by interpreting its deliberate voids.
Website Product Description: Embark on a unique journey through history where the most crucial clues are found not in what is recorded, but in what has been purposefully erased or left unspoken. As a historical detective, you'll delve into ancient texts, fragmented documents, and forgotten archives, learning to interpret the "silence" that surrounds pivotal moments. Solve intricate linguistic puzzles by reconstructing meaning from missing words and identifying glaring gaps in historical accounts. Every unexplained absence, every deliberate void in the past, becomes a vital piece of evidence. This intellectual adventure challenges you to read between the lines and transform silence into the loudest clue, revealing hidden truths that time itself has tried to bury.

Title: Echoes of Time
Concept: Unearth the Truth, Confront the Past, or Lose Yourself.
Website Product Description: Step into the shoes of a unique detective in "Echoes of Time," where your cases aren't solved by cold facts, but by delving into the emotional imprints left behind by past events. This groundbreaking mystery game challenges you to perform "emotional archaeology," experiencing lingering feelings and spectral remnants of forgotten moments. Using special echo manipulation abilities, you will navigate these powerful memories, piecing together fragments of what truly happened. But beware, each journey into the past comes at a profound psychological cost. As your mind grapples with overwhelming emotions, your own perception will warp, blurring the line between reality and illusion. Can you uncover the truth before your sanity drains and you lose yourself completely within the echoes? "Echoes of Time" offers a unique blend of immersive storytelling, intense psychological thriller, and profound detective work that rewards intuition and courage, making you question everything you thought you knew.
